response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack and web development experience but lacks the core requirements for this embedded networking security role. There is no demonstrated experience with embedded firmware, LAN-switch products, MACsec, 802.1X, or Linux kernel modification. Most critically, the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which is not listed among the candidate's languages (English, Romanian, German basic). Some C/C++ exposure exists but is dated (2014-2015 at National Instruments).
strengths: Brief C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a UNIX-style IDE
Linux familiarity and DevOps/CI infrastructure background
Long tenure and demonstrated software craftsmanship (TDD, testing)
concerns: No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security stack experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP)
No evidence of Linux kernel source modification or chip-vendor SDK work

key_factors.factor: Limited and dated C programming experience
